Foz do Iguaçu, State of Paraná. AUG 22nd, 1985

## Military report on the ground and reports of 4 aircraft in flight in the region.

AUG 22nd, 1985. Time: 08:36. Duration: 20 minutes [for the military]; several hours [for the population]. At 8:36 am, an unidentified flying object was observed by several people from the city of Foz do Iguaçu, in the state of Paraná. The reporting witness, a military operator of the Control Tower at Foz do Iguaçu Airport, reported “that he was seeing an unidentified flying object in the vicinity of the airport”. According to the Operator’s report, he saw, with b
summary: On Aug 22, 1985, a control tower operator and four aircraft crews observed a metallic circular UFO with a tail near Foz do Iguaçu airport; it moved vertically at incalculable speed and chased one aircraft.
